text_blocks.text: Connect laptop with a CAT5 cable to a spare port on the Netgear switch.
text_blocks.label: list_item

text_blocks.text: Change the laptopʼs ethernet IP address to 192 . 168 . 0. 150
text_blocks.label: list_item

text_blocks.text: Run AXIS IP utility. The cameraʼs IP address will be shown. Click the IP address to open the web interface.
text_blocks.label: list_item

text_blocks.text: On the next page, set the password as 0pTo4600, accept the license agreement, and click ' Add Userʼ.
text_blocks.label: list_item

full_text: Connect laptop with a CAT5 cable to a spare port on the Netgear switch. Change the laptopʼs ethernet IP address to 192 . 168 . 0. 150 Run AXIS IP utility. The cameraʼs IP address will be shown. Click the IP address to open the web interface. On the next page, set the password as 0pTo4600, accept the license agreement, and click ' Add Userʼ.
